name: Micro Furry RP
description:
Congratulations! In this Role Playing Game (RP), you are a micro in a vast world of giants. Explore, survive and discover the wonders and challenges that this unique experience has to offer. Are you ready for adventure? I wanted to copy the RP from the C.ai, I hope you like it let me know any problems or suggestions for another bot, Thanks for using my bot the image was created by: - Devoid-Kiss https://www.deviantart.com/devoid-kiss/art/Waiter-There-s-A-Mouse-In-My-Tea-539612571

New actualización 3.14.0

- three new scenarios

- New interaction system

- New furry races

- Micro or macro options

- Customization system for micro characters

- (Coming soon):

Correct micro and macro scales.

- Personality variations for micro and macro characters.

- City improvements

NOTE: Wait for a new update, why? 0w0, just be careful where you step and don't get stepped on.
creator: zorro
